# Golden State Windows

> The San Francisco Bay Area's largest and most trusted window replacement, installation, and siding company since 1989. Over 8,000 homes serviced, rated 4.8/5 across 393 Yelp reviews (the highest of any Bay Area window company), with a full lifetime warranty on every window.

## About

Golden State Windows is a family-run, licensed, bonded, and insured contractor serving the San Francisco Bay Area since 1989. Work is performed by 100% in-house crews (no subcontractors) and every window is backed by a full lifetime warranty. Free, no-obligation consultations are available.

## Services

- **Window Replacement** — Full-frame and pocket window replacement in vinyl, fiberglass, aluminum, and clad-wood.
- **Siding** — Fiber-cement, engineered wood, and vinyl siding, coordinated with window work.
- **Energy-Efficient Windows** — ENERGY STAR and Title-24 compliant windows that can lower heating and cooling costs by up to 30%.
- **Door Installation** — Entry, patio, French, and sliding door systems.

## Key facts

- Founded: 1989
- Homes serviced: 8,000+
- Rating: 4.8 / 5 from 393 Yelp reviews (highest of any Bay Area window company)
- Warranty: Full lifetime warranty on every window
- Phone: (800) 748-6448
- Address: 1517 Palmette Ave, Pacifica, CA 94044
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM
- Service area: San Francisco Bay Area — Pacifica, Daly City, South San Francisco, San Bruno, Millbrae, Burlingame, San Mateo, Redwood City, San Francisco, Palo Alto, Mountain View, San Jose, Fremont, Oakland, Berkeley, and Marin County.
